candidates.title: Premium Investor Pitch Deck + One-Page Brief for FanStreak
candidates.tools: Illustrator — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I need a professional investor-ready and creator-onboarding-ready pitch deck + one-page startup brief for my startup FanStreak. Live website: https://fan-streak.vercel.app/ Please open the live website yourself, explore the product, take high-quality screenshots, and use those screenshots inside the pitch deck. I do not want to manually prepare screenshots unless absolutely required. FanStreak is a creator-fan monetization platform where fans support creators, build streaks, unlock fan levels, compete on leaderboards, buy FanStreak Passport, join Creator Drops, and help creators build BrandScore / brand proof through real fan activity. The deck should be suitable for: - Investors - Creator partners - Advisors - Startup platforms - Early onboarding creators This should look like a premium startup pitch deck made by a professional agency, not a generic AI/Canva presentation. Deliverables:

candidates.title: Brand Identity Designer Needed for Ticketing & Live Events Company Rebrand
candidates.brief: We are rebranding blocktickets, a premium live event commerce and operating platform, and are looking for a world-class brand identity designer / creative agency to help define a category-leading visual identity. This is NOT a basic logo project. We are building a serious, premium brand that can compete visually and strategically with companies like: * SeatGeek * Ticketmaster * Paciolan * AXS * Stripe * Shopify ABOUT BLOCKTICKETS: blocktickets is more than a ticketing company. We help sports teams, universities, venues, leagues, and live event operators: * Sell tickets * Manage box office * Power access / entry * Run POS * Improve reporting * Own fan data * Unlock sponsorship * Build bigger businesses Our core brand platform: Build Bigger. Block by Block. Supporting line: Built for operators. Designed for fans. WHAT WE NEED: We need a premium, category-defining rebrand that positions blo

candidates.title: Minimalist Creative Logo & Branding
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I want a clean, minimalist logo that still feels unmistakably creative—something simple at first glance yet memorable enough to anchor my entire brand identity. The mark should translate effortlessly across print, digital, and live-event touch-points, so a balanced mix of negative space, clever geometry, or subtle symbolism is welcome. Beyond the primary logo, I’ll need a compact set of brand guidelines that cover secondary logo usage, recommended typography, and a versatile colour palette. I haven’t fixed the colours yet, which gives you freedom to propose tones that complement the concept while keeping the overall look fresh and professional. Because my business regularly hosts promotional events, the final package also has to extend into event design assets—think stage backdrops, roll-up banners, badge templates, and social countdown graphics—so I can maintain consistency from invitat

candidates.title: Logo Designer — BDSA Conference Newcastle 2027
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price We are a team of dental students organising the BDSA (British Dental Students' Association) Conference 2027 — the UK's largest annual dental student conference. It will be held in Newcastle in January 2027, making this the first time the event has ever come to the North East. The conference brings together around 1,000 delegates from dental schools across the UK for two days of speakers, workshops, a gala dinner, and socials. We need a logo that will live on everything — lanyards, name badges, programmes, merchandise, social media, and our official bid presentation to the BDSA AGM in June 2026. This is a visible, meaningful project and we want something we are genuinely proud to put our name on.
